title: ICAI CA Final May 2026 Result Date Announced: Get Ready to Check Your Scores!
content:
# ICAI CA Final May 2026 Result Date Announced: Get Ready to Check Your Scores!

Ek important update hai for all CA Final aspirants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne officially announce kiya hai ki May 2026 mein conduct hue Chartered Accountants Final Examination ke results ab June 18, 2026, ki shaam tak declare ho sakte hain. This is a crucial moment for thousands of candidates who have been eagerly waiting for their results.

Here are the key details you need to know:

*   **Examination:** Chartered Accountants Final Examination, May 2026.
*   **Result Declaration Date:** By the evening of June 18, 2026.
*   **How to Access:** Candidates can check their results on the official website caresults.icai.org.
*   **Credentials Required:** You will need to enter your Registration Number and Roll Number to view your result.

This announcement brings much-awaited clarity for students to plan their next steps in their professional journey. Keep your registration and roll numbers handy!

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=14189)

*Published on: 15 June 2026*
